19	export type ImageModelV2 = {
20	  /**
21	   * The image model must specify which image model interface

42	   * the global limit, or a function that returns a number or undefined,

44	   */
45	  readonly maxImagesPerCall: number | undefined | GetMaxImagesPerCallFunction;

48	   * Generates an array of images.
49	   */
50	  doGenerate(options: ImageModelV2CallOptions): PromiseLike<{
51	    /**
52	     * Generated images as base64 encoded strings or binary data.
53	     * The images should be returned without any unnecessary conversion.
54	     * If the API returns base64 encoded strings, the images should be returned

56	     * be returned as binary data.
57	     */
58	    images: Array<string> | Array<Uint8Array>;
59

61	     * Warnings for the call, e.g. unsupported settings.

## New `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider Package

### Files Created (11 files in `packages/pixelart/`):

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| **`package.json`** | Package config with `@ai-sdk/provider` and `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` deps, build/test scripts |
| **`tsconfig.json`** | TypeScript config extending the shared `ts-library.json` with project references |
| **`tsconfig.build.json`** | Build-specific TS config (disables composite for tsup) |
| **`tsup.config.ts`** | Bundle config producing CJS + ESM + DTS with `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injection |
| **`vitest.node.config.js`** | Vitest config for Node.js test environment |
| **`vitest.edge.config.js`** | Vitest config for Edge runtime test environment |
| **`src/version.ts`** | Build-time version injection pattern |
| **`src/pixelart-image-settings.ts`** | Exports `PixelArtImageModelId`, `PixelArtStyle` (`"pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"`), and `PixelArtImageSettings` (size, style, pixelDensity) |
| **`src/pixelart-image-model.ts`** | `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3` — POSTs to `{baseURL}/images/generations` with model, prompt, size, style, pixel_density, seed, n |
| **`src/pixelart-provider.ts`** | `createPixelArt()` factory + `PixelArtProvider` interface extending `ProviderV3`. Uses `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1` base URL, `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var, Bearer token auth. Throws `NoSuchModelError` for `languageModel`/`embeddingModel` (image-only) |
| **`src/index.ts`** | Re-exports all public API: `createPixelArt`, `pixelart`, `PixelArtProvider`, `PixelArtProviderSettings`, `PixelArtImageModelId`, `PixelArtImageSettings`, `PixelArtStyle`, `VERSION` |

### Key Design Decisions:
- **Follows the Black Forest Labs pattern** — the closest existing image-only provider
- **Image-only**: `languageModel()` and `embeddingModel()` throw `NoSuchModelError`
- **Provider options**: `style` and `pixelDensity` are passed via `providerOptions.pixelart` (the standard SDK pattern for provider-specific settings)
- **TypeScript compiles cleanly** — `tsc --build` produces all `.js` and `.d.ts` output files; the only errors come from pre-existing environment issues in dependent packages (identical to what the BFL provider shows)

### Files Created (11 files in `packages/pixelart/`):

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| **`package.json`** | Package config with `@ai-sdk/provider` and `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` deps, build/test scripts |
| **`tsconfig.json`** | TypeScript config extending the shared `ts-library.json` with project references |
| **`tsconfig.build.json`** | Build-specific TS config (disables composite for tsup) |
| **`tsup.config.ts`** | Bundle config producing CJS + ESM + DTS with `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injection |
| **`vitest.node.config.js`** | Vitest config for Node.js test environment |
| **`vitest.edge.config.js`** | Vitest config for Edge runtime test environment |
| **`src/version.ts`** | Build-time version injection pattern |
| **`src/pixelart-image-settings.ts`** | Exports `PixelArtImageModelId`, `PixelArtStyle` (`"pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"`), and `PixelArtImageSettings` (size, style, pixelDensity) |
| **`src/pixelart-image-model.ts`** | `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3` — POSTs to `{baseURL}/images/generations` with model, prompt, size, style, pixel_density, seed, n |
| **`src/pixelart-provider.ts`** | `createPixelArt()` factory + `PixelArtProvider` interface extending `ProviderV3`. Uses `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1` base URL, `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var, Bearer token auth. Throws `NoSuchModelError` for `languageModel`/`embeddingModel` (image-only) |
| **`src/index.ts`** | Re-exports all public API: `createPixelArt`, `pixelart`, `PixelArtProvider`, `PixelArtProviderSettings`, `PixelArtImageModelId`, `PixelArtImageSettings`, `PixelArtStyle`, `VERSION` |

### Key Design Decisions:
- **Follows the Black Forest Labs pattern** — the closest existing image-only provider
- **Image-only**: `languageModel()` and `embeddingModel()` throw `NoSuchModelError`
- **Provider options**: `style` and `pixelDensity` are passed via `providerOptions.pixelart` (the standard SDK pattern for provider-specific settings)
- **TypeScript compiles cleanly** — `tsc --build` produces all `.js` and `.d.ts` output files; the only errors come from pre-existing environment issues in dependent packages (identical to what the BFL provider shows)
